title: WA Robot Agents List Response
description: Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot agents list'. Returns installed agent inventory from filesystem detection plus a summary rollup.

installed_agents.description: Detected or candidate installed agents discovered from local filesystem probes

summary.description: Rollup counts for the installed and running inventory

detected.description: Whether detection heuristics found a concrete local installation

evidence.description: Human-readable evidence explaining the detection result

root_paths.description: Filesystem roots considered or discovered for this agent

summary.description: Aggregate counts for installed and running agent inventory

installed.description: Installed agents positively detected on disk

running.description: Running agents currently inferred from panes

configured.description: Installed agents with an associated configuration path

installed_but_idle.description: Installed agents not currently inferred as running
